positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify the authenticated user's name or profile indicator is visible on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All login page UI elements are correctly rendered, accessible, and functional
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page title or heading is displayed (e.g., 'Login' or 'Sign In')
Verify the email/username input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password field masks input characters
Verify the 'Login' / 'Submit' button is visible and clickable
Verify any 'Forgot Password' or 'Sign Up' links are present if applicable
positive_scenarios.title: Login page UI elements are fully rendered and accessible

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh; user remains authenticated and on the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page content is still displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful as the system treats the email as case-insensitive; user is redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' in the username/email field (uppercase version of valid email)
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify no error message is displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with email address containing uppercase letters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and the user is redirected to the login page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Locate and click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button or menu option
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify the session is terminated and the user cannot access protected pages by navigating back
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Authenticated users attempting to access the login page are redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Attempt to navigate directly to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login again
Verify the user is automatically redirected to the dashboard and not shown the login form again
positive_scenarios.title: Login page is not accessible after successful authentication (redirect protection)

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented; validation error messages are shown for both empty username and password fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g., 'Email is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected; a generic error message is displayed without revealing which field is incorrect
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Incorrect username or password'
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with valid username but incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected; an error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistent_user_xyz@fakedomain.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'AnyPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'User not found')
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with invalid/non-existent email and any password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented; an error message indicating the username/email field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the username field (e.g., 'Email is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails when username field is empty and password is provided

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented; an error message indicating the password field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the password field (e.g., 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails when password field is empty and username is provided

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented; a validation message indicating an invalid email format is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051gmail.com' in the username/email field (missing @ symbol)
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an email format validation error is displayed (e.g., 'Please enter a valid email address')
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with invalid email format (no @ symbol)

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected; the application handles the SQL injection attempt gracefully without authenticating the user or exposing sensitive data
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter '\' OR '1'='1' --' in the username/email field
Enter 'AnyPassword' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page and is NOT authenticated
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed
Verify no sensitive application data or stack trace is exposed
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with SQL injection attempt in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected gracefully; an appropriate validation or error message is shown and the application remains stable
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a string of 256 or more characters in the username/email field (e.g., 'aaaaaa...aaaa@test.com')
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed or the input is truncated/rejected
Verify the application does not crash or throw an unhandled exception
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with excessively long username input (boundary value)
